name: tmux-vanzi-hub
description: Vanzi Hub — a persistent multi-agent ACP hub for tmux: Codex, Claude Code, and any Agent Client Protocol agent in popups, with saved transcripts
author: Brian Tarqui

scripts.test: node tests/picker.mjs && node tests/composer-layout.mjs && node tests/autocomplete.mjs && node tests/highlight.mjs && node tests/render-width.mjs && node tests/render-stream.mjs && node tests/render-live-table.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs
